testCases.title: Admin SPA loads and key blades open
testCases.notes: Login succeeded with admin. Platform v3.1007.0. Catalog blade opened (23 catalogs), Orders blade opened (7,370 orders), Contacts blade opened (548 entries). No Angular console errors beyond known shipping pickup-locations 404 and unhandled rejection on load.

testCases.title: Platform modules show Active status with no errors
testCases.notes: Modules blade loaded. Browse: 76, Installed: 76, Updates: 0. No modules in Error or Disabled state.

testCases.title: API health check - GET /api/platform/modules responds
testCases.notes: GET /api/platform/modules returned HTTP 200 OK, Content-Type: application/json, 76 modules in response body.

testCases.title: GraphQL endpoint accepts introspection query
testCases.notes: POST /graphql introspection returned valid schema. queryType: Query, mutationType: Mutations, 400 types registered. No errors.

testCases.title: OAuth token endpoint works
testCases.notes: POST /connect/token with grant_type=password returned HTTP 200, Bearer token, expires_in: 1799s, refresh_token present.

errors.description: Known console errors on page load: (1) Failed to load resource /api/shipping/pickup-locations/indexedSearchEnabled (404), (2) Possibly unhandled rejection in error.js. Both are pre-existing and not new regressions.
